title: tetragonia angustifolia
intro: Tetragonia angustifolia, also known as the New Zealand spinach or Warrigal greens, is a type of succulent plant native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily as a diuretic and to treat digestive issues, due to its high content of vitamins and minerals. The health benefits of Tetragonia angustifolia include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or added to salads, and it can also be used as a cooking green or dried for later use.
